title: Logical NOT !
subtitle: Changes true to false
goal: Learn to use the ! operator to change true to false and false to true.
explanation: It changes a Boolean value to its opposite.
NOT is often used to check the opposite of a condition.

analogy.title: Analogy
analogy.text: Imagine a light switch. If the light is on, the ! operator turns it off. If it is off, the operator turns it on.

remember: ! changes a value to its opposite.

mistake.title: Common mistake
mistake.text: Beginners sometimes think ! only checks a value. In fact, it returns the opposite Boolean value.
